g.text: ● TUI 개선 — TOC 위치/점프, 우측패널 활용, 중앙패널 phase-flow화 ▶ iter 16
• s_002 parse_numstat handles binary (-\t-\t) and empty input returning safe sentinels
• s_003 build_overview_payload on fresh goal (no task) returns dict with iterations=[]
• s_004 build_overview_payload extracts purpose from brainstorm.md premises[0] and
• s_005 build_overview_payload iterates decisions.jsonl + changes/iter_N.diff producing
iterations list with numstat per iter
• s_006 build_overview_payload treats corrupt plan.json as partial failure — purpose
• s_007 MCP tool devboard_build_overview registered and dispatches to
• s_008 render_overview_body(payload) returns markdown string containing all 4 section
• s_009 render_dev_timeline(payload) emits per-iter block with iter number, phase,
verdict, and numstat file list, ordered oldest-top
• s_010 render_result_timeline(payload) emits atomic_steps checklist with completed
• s_011 render_review_sections(payload) emits 4 text-label section headers
• s_012 PhaseFlowView composes 5 TabPanes with ids [overview, plan, dev, result, review]
• s_014 DevBoardApp forwards keys 1..5 to phase_flow.action_activate_tab mapping to the
• s_015 Existing test_phase_flow.py keybinding assertions updated to 1..5 mapping
□ R5 우측 패널 재설계 (후속 goal candidate) — src/devboard/tui/board_view.py,
